narrative:
Scott Township has 1,308 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
